canonical_definition: Across the provided literature, TREC-DL 2020 is consistently described as a benchmark dataset or test set from the TREC Deep Learning Track 2020. It is most commonly used to evaluate systems on information retrieval tasks, with several papers specifying its use for assessing performance in 'passage retrieval' and 'reranking' or 're-ranking'. One paper further specifies its application for evaluating 'LLM-based ranking systems on document relevance tasks'. The dataset is frequently mentioned alongside TREC-DL 2019, with one source noting it 'extend[s] TREC DL 2019 with additional queries and relevance annotations'. Two papers state its connection to MS MARCO, with one specifying it is 'derived from MS-MARCO-V1'. Papers characterize the benchmark in different ways; one describes it as an 'in-domain' evaluation dataset, while another notes that it is 'not reasoning intensive'.
papers: Detecting Knowledge Boundary of Vision Large Language Models by Sampling-Based Inference
From perception to production: how acoustic invariance facilitates articulatory learning in a self-supervised vocal imitation model
HMoE: Heterogeneous Mixture of Experts for Language Modeling
LLMs Behind the Scenes: Enabling Narrative Scene Illustration
SAFENUDGE: Safeguarding Large Language Models in Real-time with Tunable Safety-Performance Trade-offs

definitions.text: A benchmark dataset from the TREC Deep Learning Track 2020, derived from MS-MARCO-V1, used for in-domain evaluation of information retrieval and reranking tasks.
definitions.paper: LLMs Behind the Scenes: Enabling Narrative Scene Illustration

definitions.text: A test set from the TREC Deep Learning Track 2020, used for evaluating passage retrieval systems, often in conjunction with MS MARCO.
definitions.paper: SAFENUDGE: Safeguarding Large Language Models in Real-time with Tunable Safety-Performance Trade-offs

definitions.text: Benchmark dataset from the Text REtrieval Conference used to evaluate LLM-based ranking systems on document relevance tasks, assessing performance in passage retrieval and reranking.
definitions.paper: HMoE: Heterogeneous Mixture of Experts for Language Modeling

definitions.text: Benchmark dataset for evaluating document re-ranking systems in information retrieval, extending TREC DL 2019 with additional queries and relevance annotations for deep learning-based retrieval.
definitions.paper: From perception to production: how acoustic invariance facilitates articulatory learning in a self-supervised vocal imitation model
